title: verbascum belasitzae
intro: Verbascum belasitzae, also known as the Belasitz mullein, is a perennial plant species within the verbascum genus, characterized by its tall, stately stems and yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Verbascum belasitzae include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Verbascum belasitzae are often infused in teas or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
